name: Escape Route Decision
summary: The party must decide how to move civilians safely from Marta's cabin. Three options on the table.

objectives.text: Choose escape route: South Road, Forest Path NE, or Hold for Harpers
Brief civilians on the chosen plan

current_stage: Decision pending — Rurik has not yet chosen.

forest_path_ne.intel: Weakening thralls may linger, rougher terrain

hold_for_harpers.intel: Harpers arrive Day 9 with armed support
